title: I18nUpdateMod Non-LTS
description: A localized mod for Chinese players, an I18nUpdateMod2 Fork
body:
# I18nUpdateMod Non-LTS

## 简体中文：

这个是 [I18nUpdateMod2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i18nupdatemod) 的 Fork，添加了对于 I18nUpdateMod2 不支持的游戏版本/加载器。

这是一个专为中国玩家设计的模组，在装上该模组后，玩家打开游戏时会自动下载汉化资源包，自动装载上，自动切换语言为简体中文。

Patchouli mixin 代码使用声明：[TexTrueStudio/I18nUpdateMod2-NLTS#3](https://github.com/TexTrueStudio/I18nUpdateMod2-NLTS/issues/3)

图标使用 [icon8](https://icons8.com/) 的图标组合而成。

### 已知问题：

- 在 1.17.x 和 1.15.x，下载资源包后无法加载，因为资源包内的 [pack.mcmeta](https://minecraft.fandom.com/zh/wiki/%E8%B5%84%E6%BA%90%E5%8C%85#%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9) 的 "pack_format" 为 6（1.17.x/1.15.x下载的资源包）。 **请不要向CFPA反馈此问题，因为他们目前没有支持 1.17.x 和 1.15.x 的计划。**

---
## English:

This is a Fork of [I18nUpdateMod2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i18nupdatemod), adding game versions/loaders that are not supported for I18nUpdateMod2.

This is a mod designed for Chinese players, after installing this mod, players will automatically download the Chinese resource pack when they open the game, automatically load it, and automatically switch the language to Simplified Chinese.

Patchouli mixin code used: [TexTrueStudio/I18nUpdateMod2-NLTS#3](https://github.com/TexTrueStudio/I18nUpdateMod2-NLTS/issues/3)

Icons are assembled using the icons from [icon8](https://icons8.com/).

### Known issues:

- In 1.17.x and 1.15.x, after downloading a resource pack, it does not load because the pack_format of [pack.mcmeta](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Resource_pack#Pack_format) inside the resource pack is "pack_format" of 6 (for 1.17.x/1.15.x downloaded packs). **Please do not feedback this issue to CFPA, as they currently have no plans to support 1.17.x and 1.15.x.**
